message:
chore(gitignore): cover .beads/*.lock files

Since beads_rust 3a40ad0 landed the shared write-lock lifecycle (MCP
handlers now acquire the same .beads/.write.lock and .beads/.sync.lock
files the CLI uses), any mutating `br` operation or `br serve` session
on this repo's beads store leaves those lock files on disk while the
caller is running.

Add `.beads/*.lock` right after the existing `.beads/.br_history/`
line so the intent is co-located with the other Beads ephemeral-state
entries. Consistent with the new .beads/*.lock line in beads_rust,
CASS, mcp_agent_mail_rust, and agentic_coding_flywheel_setup.

files.patch:
@@ -127,6 +127,9 @@ visible
 # Beads history snapshots
 .beads/.br_history/
 
+# Beads lock files (write/sync/bv/br advisory flocks)
+.beads/*.lock
+
 # Ephemeral files (agent-generated, build artifacts, test detritus)
 ci-artifacts/
 proptest-regressions/
